prompts.label: Essential shell commands
prompts.text:
Teach 15 essential Linux commands for developers new to terminal.

- ls, cd, pwd, mkdir, rm, cp, mv, cat, less, grep, chmod, man
- One example each

Assume Ubuntu or WSL.

prompts.label: Bash script variables
prompts.text:
Write hello.sh with variables and echo.

- shebang, chmod +x
- positional parameters $1

Safe quoting double vs single.

prompts.label: if and loops in Bash
prompts.text:
Script that loops over *.txt files and counts lines.

- if [ -f ], for loop, wc -l

Add comments for beginners.

prompts.label: grep and find
prompts.text:
Find all .py files under project and search TODO with grep -r.

- Explain pipes |

Practical examples.

prompts.label: chmod and chown basics
prompts.text:
Explain rwx permissions and chmod 755 for a script.

- ls -l reading drwxr-xr-x
- Never chmod 777 on production — warning

Short lesson.

prompts.label: curl test API
prompts.text:
curl examples GET and POST JSON to localhost API.

- Headers Content-Type application/json
- -d body file

For testing FastAPI or Express.

prompts.label: ssh connect to server
prompts.text:
Beginner guide to ssh user@host and ssh-keygen.

- Copy public key to server concept
- Config file ~/.ssh/config Host alias

Security hygiene.

prompts.label: systemd service overview
prompts.text:
What is systemd and a simple service unit for Node app (conceptual).

- systemctl start stop status
- Not full production hardening

Outline only.

prompts.label: tail journalctl logs
prompts.text:
Read logs with journalctl -u myapp -f and tail -f file.log.

- When debugging failed deploy

5 commands cheat sheet.

prompts.label: WSL2 on Windows dev
prompts.text:
Set up WSL2 for web development on Windows.

- Install Ubuntu, git, node, docker optional
- Access files from Windows path /mnt/c/

Common pitfalls.

prompts.label: container networking veth primer
prompts.text:
Explain simplified bridged networking with host–container bridges at a cartoon level.
Point out why learning ip addr and ip route first still matters.
Mention mtu “black hole” symptoms only as troubleshooting vocabulary.
Emphasize using packet capture ethically and rarely in production.
Defer to distro docs (such as Netplan) for persistent network config.
